sketches.mechanism: Goroutine launched with no channel to receive from; the main function exits before the goroutine finishes, silently killing it
sketches.resonance: A voice that begins speaking into a world that has already ended — the runtime's silent goroutine reaping becomes abandonment.

sketches.mechanism: The Nothing type, which is the bottom type — a function returning Nothing can never actually return, it must throw or loop forever
sketches.resonance: To promise nothing is not emptiness but impossibility — the type system guarantees you will never come back from this.

sketches.mechanism: A WeakReference that allows the garbage collector to reclaim the referent at any time, so get() returns null unpredictably
sketches.resonance: Holding someone without the strength to keep them — the reference exists but the presence can vanish between one line and the next.
